tests.source_program:
@global = external global i8, align 1
@global.1 = external global i32, align 4
@global.2 = external global i8, align 1
@global.3 = external global i32, align 4

; Function Attrs: nounwind
define signext i32 @wobble() #0 {
bb:
  %tmp = load i8, ptr @global, align 1
  %tmp1 = zext i8 %tmp to i32
  %tmp2 = add nuw nsw i32 %tmp1, 1
  store i32 %tmp2, ptr @global.1, align 4
  %tmp3 = load i8, ptr @global.2, align 1
  %tmp4 = zext i8 %tmp3 to i32
  %tmp5 = mul nuw nsw i32 %tmp2, %tmp4
  %tmp6 = trunc i32 %tmp5 to i16
  %tmp7 = udiv i16 %tmp6, 5
  %tmp8 = zext i16 %tmp7 to i32
  store i32 %tmp8, ptr @global.3, align 4
  %tmp9 = icmp ult i32 %tmp5, 5
  br i1 %tmp9, label %bb12, label %bb10

bb10:                                             ; preds = %bb
  %tmp11 = tail call signext i32 @quux()
  br label %bb12

bb12:                                             ; preds = %bb10, %bb
  ret i32 undef
}

declare signext i32 @quux(...)

attributes #0 = { nounwind }

@i = external global i32, align 4

; Function Attrs: nounwind
define i32 @undef_and_known_tailc() #0 {
entry:
  %val = load i32, ptr @i, align 4
  switch i32 %val, label %return [
    i32 2, label %case_2
    i32 5, label %case_5
  ]

case_2:                                           ; preds = %entry
  %rv_unused = tail call i32 @quux()
  br label %return

case_5:                                           ; preds = %entry
  %rv = tail call i32 @qux()
  br label %return

return:                                           ; preds = %case_5, %case_2, %entry
  %phi = phi i32 [ undef, %case_2 ], [ %rv, %case_5 ], [ undef, %entry ]
  ret i32 %phi
}

declare i32 @qux()

declare i32 @quux()

attributes #0 = { nounwind }

@i = external global i32, align 4

; Function Attrs: nounwind
define i32 @undef_tailc() #0 {
entry:
  %val = load i32, ptr @i, align 4
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %val, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %return, label %if.then

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %rv_unused = tail call i32 @qux()
  br label %return

return:                                           ; preds = %if.then, %entry
  ret i32 undef
}

declare i32 @qux()

attributes #0 = { nounwind }

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nounwind
define ptr @strcpy_illegal_tailc(ptr %dest, i64 %sz, ptr readonly returned %src) #0 {
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nounwind
define ptr @strcpy_illegal_tailc(ptr %dest, i64 %sz, ptr readonly returned %src) #0 {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %sz, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %return, label %if.then

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %0 = tail call ptr @strcpy(ptr dereferenceable(1) %dest, ptr dereferenceable(1) %src)
  br label %return

return:                                           ; preds = %if.then, %entry
  ret ptr %src
}

declare ptr @strcpy(ptr noalias returned writeonly, ptr noalias nocapture readonly)

attributes #0 = { nounwind }

issue.title: Missed tail call optimization on undefined return value for all architectures
issue.author: widlarizer
